result: If I could change the world in one way, I would increase empathy, compassion and understanding between all people. I believe so many of the world's problems stem from a lack of seeing things from others' perspectives, and an "us vs. them" tribal mentality. If everyone had more empathy for the experiences and struggles of others, even those very different from themselves, I think it would go a long way toward reducing conflict, prejudice, inequality and suffering in the world. With more compassion and a recognition of our common humanity, we could work together to solve global challenges and create a more just, peaceful world for all. Of course, increasing empathy is easier said than done. But I believe empathy is a skill that can be practiced and strengthened, and doing so on a global scale is the single change I would most want to see in the world.
